---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: "bug"
assignees: ""
---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🚶 Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 📸 Screenshots / Recordings
If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings to help explain your problem.

## 💻 Environment Setup
- **OS**: [e.g. macOS 14.2, Windows 11]
- **Browser/Environment**: [e.g. Chrome 120, Node v20.10]
- **Version/Commit**: [e.g. v1.4.2 or commit hash]

## 📋 Additional context & Logs
Add any other context about the problem here, including stack traces or server log outputs.
